name: Eye of Nollyn
short_description: The noir detective game where you can bribe people for puzzle hints.
detailed_description:
In the city Nollyn, where money is what counts and what rules, is the private eye, Vin Virosa. He returns from years of hiatus as he's requested a case investigation from the president of Wilsons Corporation, the electric power corporation of the city. But as the investigation continues, something doesn't seem right...


Unique background

Eye of Nollyn isn't about an ingenious hero in a trench coat working to protect a just society. Become the private eye of the city, solve cases you're commissioned to, and claim the reward you deserve.

Story full of drama and twists

Are you a fan of plot twists and foreshadowings? This game has a lot of them. Sit back, relax, and savor the experience. If you rush through, you might miss all the fun.

Intuitive questions

Eye of Nollyn features a unique combination of multiple-choice and short-answer questions designed for players of varying expertise in detective games. Remember, there are no puzzles you can't solve in this game. You're smarter than you think you are.

Bribery System

Still scared to try out the game? In Eye of Nollyn, players have the wonderful option to bribe NPCs to extract additional information that might help them solve mysteries. Consider throwing some bucks at your biggest problem. What could possibly go wrong?
